item.title: “2秒内损失100万美元”：市场动荡冲击交易台
item.description: 伦敦时间凌晨1点，市场动荡将迈克尔·布朗惊醒。他的手机就放在床边，此刻正不断发出提示音，简直是“嗡嗡嗡”地响个不停：布伦特原油突破每桶100美元；超过110美元；纳斯达克期货下跌2%；日经指数暴跌5%。【原文：It was 1 a.m. in London when the markets jarred Michael Brown awake. He had his phone next to his bed, and it had started pinging him with alerts, just “buzzing and buzzing and buzzing”: Brent crude is over $100 a barrel; over $110; Nasdaq futures sink 2%; the Nikkei plunges 5%.】

item.title: 特拉维斯·卡兰尼克推出“有偿就业机器人”计划
item.description: 优步科技公司（Uber Technologies Inc.）联合创始人特拉维斯·卡兰尼克（Travis Kalanick）启动了一项新业务，致力于为餐饮、采矿和运输行业打造“能创造经济价值的机器人”。【原文：Uber Technologies Inc. co-founder Travis Kalanick has launched a new venture that will focus on creating “gainfully employed robots” for the food, mining and transport industries.】

item.title: 布伦特原油连续第二个交易日收于100美元上方
item.description: 受中东冲突持续发酵以及世界各国领导人竭力应对石油市场历史上最大规模的供应中断影响，布伦特原油连续第二个交易日收于每桶100美元上方，当日收盘价创下逾三年来的最高水平。【原文：Brent crude settled above $100 a barrel for the second straight session, ending the day at the highest level in more than three years as the conflict in the Middle East drags on and world leaders struggle to resolve the biggest disruption to the oil market in history.】

item.title: 随着交易商担忧霍尔木兹海峡封锁将持续更久，石油危机进一步加剧
item.description: 石油市场历史上最严重的供应中断目前仍无缓解迹象，自伊朗冲突爆发以来，原油价格已飙升40%，这让全球经济难以喘息。【原文：The worst supply disruption in the history of the oil market is showing no signs of abating anytime soon, offering the global economy little respite from crude prices that have surged 40% since the Iran war began.】

item.title: 埃尼公司看到在马杜罗下台后的新局面中出口委内瑞拉天然气的途径
item.description: 意大利能源公司埃尼集团（Eni SpA）认为出口委内瑞拉天然气具有潜力，这再次表明，在得到美国支持的临时政府领导下，这个加勒比国家正逐步重返国际市场。【原文：Italian energy company Eni SpA sees potential to export Venezuelan gas in a fresh sign of the Caribbean country’s gradual return to international markets under a US-supported interim administration.】

item.title: 2026年游戏开发者大会的五大亮点
item.description: 本周在旧金山举行的GDC大会上，求职者、联合开发工作室和人工智能相关内容比比皆是【原文：GDC in San Francisco this week was full of job-seekers, co-development studios and AI】

item.title: 在机构投资者萎靡之际，零售原油交易者引爆ETF热潮
item.description: 当2月下旬美国战机首次在德黑兰上空投下阴影时，安东尼·桑福德就知道是时候重返能源行业了。【原文：Anthony Sandford knew it was time to jump back into the energy sector when US warplanes first cast shadows over Tehran in late February.】

item.title: 泰国炼油商罕见购入北海福蒂斯原油
item.description: 一家泰国炼油商罕见地从托克集团（Trafigura Group）购入了北海福蒂斯（Forties）原油，因为亚洲加工商正争相寻找替代方案，以应对滞留在波斯湾的中东原油供应。【原文：A Thai oil refiner made a rare purchase of North Sea Forties crude from Trafigura Group as Asian processors scramble to find alternatives to Middle Eastern supplies stuck in the Persian Gulf.】

item.title: 印度调整IPO规则，为安巴尼旗下数字业务部门上市铺平道路
item.description: 印度政府周五宣布修改上市规则，为亿万富翁穆克什·安巴尼推动其旗下综合企业信实工业有限公司（Reliance Industries Ltd.）的数字业务部门——Jio Platforms Ltd.——进行首次公开募股（IPO）扫清了障碍。【原文：The Indian government on Friday announced changes to listing rules, clearing the way for billionaire Mukesh Ambani to go for an initial public offering of Jio Platforms Ltd., the digital arm of his conglomerate Reliance Industries Ltd.】

item.title: 随着伊朗战争冲击资产市场，市场压力已逼近关税冲击水平
item.description: 随着伊朗局势推高油价、推升借贷成本并推强美元，市场压力正以去年关税冲击以来最快的速度积聚——这一系列因素正同时给金融市场的几乎每个角落都带来压力。【原文：Market stress is building at the fastest pace since last year’s tariff shock, as the war in Iran pushes oil prices higher, drives up borrowing costs and strengthens the dollar — a combination that is putting pressure on virtually every corner of financial markets at once.】

item.title: 油价动荡冲击了规模达1340亿美元的量化交易体系
item.description: 中东冲突引发的油价急剧飙升，正动摇着华尔街各大银行力推的、最受欢迎的系统化策略之一。【原文：The rapid surge in oil prices unleashed by conflict in the Middle East is jolting one of the most popular systematic strategies touted by big banks on Wall Street.】

item.title: 对你的债券对冲策略感到沮丧吗？不妨试试缓冲型ETF？
item.description: 随着传统对冲工具表现不佳，华尔街正大力推广债券替代品【原文：Wall Street is pitching bond alternatives as traditional hedges disappoint】

item.title: 曼达尼呼吁将纽约州遗产税起征点下调90%至75万美元
item.description: 纽约市长佐赫兰·马姆达尼希望将纽约州的遗产税免税额下限削减近90%，从700多万美元降至75万美元，并将遗产税最高税率从16%提高至50%。【原文：New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani wants to slash New York state’s estate tax exemption threshold by almost 90%, from a more than $7 million limit to $750,000, and raise the top estate tax rate from 16% to 50%.】

item.title: 拉美左翼三人组呼吁伊朗停火
item.description: 由左翼总统领导的拉丁美洲三大国——墨西哥、哥伦比亚和巴西——发表了一份联合声明，呼吁暂停伊朗的战争，以此协调一致地呼吁和平与外交谈判。【原文：The three biggest Latin American nations led by leftist presidents — Mexico, Colombia and Brazil — issued a joint statement calling for a pause in the war in Iran, in a coordinated appeal for peace and diplomatic negotiations.】

item.title: SpaceX投资者贝利·吉福德盛赞对xAI的上市前收购
item.description: 据一位SpaceX投资者透露，埃隆·马斯克正借鉴他以往的策略，在这家轨道发射公司首次公开募股（IPO）之前让SpaceX收购xAI，以此为合并后的企业奠定快速增长的基础。【原文：Elon Musk is drawing on his past playbook with SpaceX taking over xAI ahead of the orbital launch company’s initial public offering, positioning the combined business for a burst of growth, according to a SpaceX investor.】

item.title: 原油交易的复杂性——通过ETF来解读
item.description:
即使在和平时期，这也可能存在风险。如今海湾地区战火纷飞， 我们将为您详细解析如何最佳投资该大宗商品。【原文：

It can be risky even in peacetime. Now with war in the Gulf, we break down how best to invest in the commodity.

】

item.title: 随着油价上涨，美国在伊朗战争中加剧空袭并升级言辞
item.description: 美国表示，已将对伊朗的空袭升级至前所未有的程度。这场已持续两周的冲突中，交战双方均威胁要进一步升级局势，导致能源供应中断并引发全球金融市场动荡。【原文：The US said it had stepped up strikes on Iran to unprecedented levels as both sides in the war threatened to escalate a conflict hitting its two-week mark and upending energy flows and global financial markets.】

item.title: 中国放宽对必和必拓铁矿石的禁令，此前多家钢厂争相采购
item.description: 中国一家国有背景的铁矿石贸易商已告知钢铁企业，将暂时放宽对必和必拓集团某款铁矿石的限制。此前，市场担忧针对这家矿业巨头的禁运范围可能扩大，导致本周铁矿石价格上涨。【原文：China’s state-backed iron ore trader has told steel mills that it’s temporarily easing restrictions on one of BHP Group’s grades, after worries over a broadening of bans against the mining giant sent prices rising this week.】

item.title: 伊朗安排专机将水手从印度接回
item.description: 据一位知情人士透露，伊朗已安排了特别航班，将约180名水手从印度接回。【原文：Iran has arranged special transportation to return about 180 sailors from India, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 欧盟拟暂停部分免税糖进口一年
item.description: 欧盟委员会计划暂停部分免税糖的进口“至少一年”，以帮助稳定欧盟内部的糖价。【原文：The European Commission is set to suspend some duty-free sugar imports for “at least a year” to help stabilize prices within the bloc.】

item.title: 巴西国家石油公司（Petrobras）在巴西燃油税减免后上调柴油价格
item.description: 就在巴西政府宣布实施燃油联邦税收减免政策以保护消费者免受原油价格飙升影响的次日，巴西国有石油巨头巴西国家石油公司（Petroleo Brasileiro SA）便上调了国内柴油价格。【原文：Brazil’s state-controlled oil giant Petroleo Brasileiro SA raised domestic diesel prices just a day after the Brazilian government announced federal tax breaks on fuels to shield consumers from surging crude prices.】

item.title: “2008”梗持续发酵
item.description: 往昔的回响。【原文：Echoes of the past.】

item.title: 票务转售商公布业绩疲软后，Vivid Seats的财务状况进一步恶化
item.description: 票务转售商Vivid Seats Inc.公布财报后，其债务进一步陷入困境，原因是该公司业绩未达预期，且预计今年业绩将进一步恶化。【原文：Vivid Seats Inc.’s debt sank further into distressed territory after the ticket reseller reported earnings that missed estimates and guided for even weaker results this year.】

item.title: 印度将暂停IDBI银行的出售计划，因两份报价均不可行
item.description: 据知情人士透露，由于收到的报价均低于设定的底价，印度将取消针对IDBI银行有限公司多数股权的竞标。【原文：India is set to scrap the bids it received for a majority stake in IDBI Bank Ltd. as the amounts were below the minimum price sought, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 随着沙特急于绕过霍尔木兹海峡，超级油轮在红海集结
item.description: 沙特阿拉伯为绕过霍尔木兹海峡而展开的竞逐，导致大量超级油轮在该国红海沿岸外海集结等待装货，利雅得正试图克服伊朗战争造成的史无前例的供应中断。【原文：Saudi Arabia’s race to bypass the Strait of Hormuz has led to a buildup of oil supertankers waiting off the kingdom’s Red Sea coast to collect cargoes, as Riyadh tries to overcome unprecedented disruption caused by the Iran war.】

item.title: 亚马逊将采用Cerebras的巨型芯片来运行人工智能模型
item.description: 亚马逊公司计划将初创企业Cerebras Systems的芯片与自家Trainium处理器结合使用，两家公司表示，这种组合将能更好地运行人工智能软件。【原文：Amazon.com Inc. plans to use chips from startup Cerebras Systems Inc. alongside its own Trainium processors, a combination that the companies say will be able to better run AI software.】

item.title: 佩顿·曼宁支持的女子足球队发行私募债券
item.description: 佩顿·曼宁【原文：Peyton Manning】

item.title: 据称，丹麦制药商Leo Pharma正在寻求银行就其首次公开募股（IPO）进行推介
item.description: 据知情人士透露，拥有百年历史的丹麦制药商Leo Pharma A/S已邀请多家投行竞标其潜在首次公开募股（IPO）项目，该公司距离上市已越来越近。【原文：Leo Pharma A/S has invited investment bankers to vie for roles in a potential initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the more-than-a-century-old Danish drugmaker edges closer to going public.】

item.title: Venture Global批准86亿美元的美国液化天然气出口扩建项目
item.description: Venture Global Inc. 周五表示，该公司将推进其在路易斯安那州的第三个液化天然气出口项目的扩建计划，该项目投资额达86亿美元。【原文：Venture Global Inc. will move forward with an $8.6 billion expansion of its third liquefied natural gas export project in Louisiana, the company said on Friday.】

item.title: Adobe将提供价值7500万美元的免费服务以了结政府提起的诉讼
item.description: Adobe公司将支付约1.5亿美元，以解决美国监管机构对其提出的指控——这家创意软件公司让消费者难以取消订阅。【原文：Adobe Inc. will pay about $150 million to settle a complaint from US regulators that the creative software company made it too difficult for consumers to cancel their subscriptions.】
